title: data.autoPromotionHolds
description: The Stage's committed auto-promotion holds, keyed by Warehouse origin. An entry means auto-promotion is paused for that origin (an operator promoted Freight other than the auto-promotion candidate), so the gate denies an auto-forward for it until the hold is released. Origins with no hold are absent.

freightName.description: The Freight selected when the hold was created.

promotionName.description: The Promotion that established the hold.

actor.description: The user who triggered the hold.

createdAt.description: RFC3339; creation time of the Promotion that established the hold.
